message:
refactor(abi): migrate futex and semaphore helpers to native syscall

Replace libc::syscall(SYS_futex) with syscall::sys_futex for:
- sem_futex_wait
- sem_futex_wait_timed
- sem_futex_wake
- futex() public API

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 111 to 107.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
